description_long: This is a dark, elegant two-seater sofa with a classic Chesterfield-inspired design, featuring deep button tufting on the backrest and seat. The upholstery appears to be a smooth, slightly glossy leather or faux leather in a deep navy or black color. The armrests are rolled and generously padded, matching the height of the backrest and adding to the traditional aesthetic. The sofa sits on four slender, curved legs, likely made of wood or metal, which elevate it slightly off the ground. The seat and back cushions are integrated and uniformly tufted, giving a plush yet structured appearance. This piece would be well-suited for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, stylish cafes, or residential living rooms.
description: A dark, tufted leather sofa with rolled arms and curved legs, exuding a classic Chesterfield style. The upholstery is smooth and glossy, with deep button detailing and a plush, structured form.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rolled armrest and the sofa's depth, with visible tufting on the backrest and seat.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical button-tufted backrest, seat, and both rolled armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the other rolled armrest and the sofa's profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the smooth, slightly curved back with minimal detailing and the four slender legs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two attached, uniformly sized seat cushions and a continuous, deeply tufted backrest with integrated cushioning; all cushions are fixed and feature button tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, rolled armrests at the same height as the backrest, generously padded and rounded with a classic, traditional profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, curved legs positioned at the corners, likely made of wood or metal, with an exposed, slightly ornate design.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and curved backrest with deep button tufting, integrated with the armrests and featuring a plush, structured form.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark color with a smooth, glossy finish and prominent button tufting creating a diamond pattern across the backrest and seat.
